# Pranshu Rastogi — Personal Portfolio

## Who is Pranshu Rastogi?
Pranshu Rastogi is a blockchain engineer, ecosystem builder, speaker, writer, and educator based in India. He currently serves as Head of Ecosystem & Integrations at Push Chain (formerly Push Protocol). He has over 7 years of experience in the Web3 and blockchain space.

## Career
- Head of Ecosystem & Integrations, Push Chain (Apr 2023 – Present)
- VP of Engineering, Push Protocol (Nov 2021 – May 2023)
- Software Engineer, Dhiway (Aug 2020 – Sep 2021)
- Software Engineer, Terse Software Pvt. Ltd. (Apr 2019 – Jul 2020)

## Expertise
Blockchain, Web3, DeFi, Ethereum, Smart Contracts, Solidity, Ecosystem Development, Push Protocol, Next.js, React, Community Building, Technical Writing, Public Speaking

## Projects
- AlphIQ: All-in-one Alephium dashboard for real-time blockchain analytics — https://www.alphiq.xyz/
- Bloom Ideas: Decentralized platform for collaborative idea sharing with NFT rewards — https://soc-bloom-ideas.vercel.app/
- IntelliLearn: Gamified Web3 education platform — https://il-core.vercel.app/login
- AlphIQ Admin Dashboard: Admin panel for managing AlphIQ — https://admin.alphiq.xyz/
- EYI: Decentralized identity platform with ENS, GitHub, X, and Farcaster verification — https://eyi-two.vercel.app/

## Achievements
- 1,000+ integrations implemented at Push Protocol
- Hosted 30+ hackathons globally
- Launched the BRB Bootcamp
- Mentored 2,500+ students via e-learning platforms
- 30+ speaking engagements at conferences
- 20+ published technical articles

## Education
Lovely Professional University
